# Paths in this fork that must always keep the syscc/OpenList version when
# syncing from OpenListTeam/OpenList.
#
# One path per line. Directories are restored recursively. Paths that do not
# exist in this fork are removed again after an upstream merge.
AGENTS.md
README.md
README_cn.md
README_ja.md
README_nl.md
README
.github/beta-prs.txt
.github/fork-owned-paths.txt
.github/workflows
